name: Ward 1 — Rajpur
description: Covers Rajpur main road, Gandhi Chowk, and surrounding residential areas.

name: Ward 2 — Laxmi Nagar
description: Includes Laxmi Nagar market, the government hospital, and bus stand area.

name: Ward 3 — Shivaji Nagar
description: Covers Shivaji Nagar colony, primary school, and Hanuman Temple road.

name: Ward 4 — Downtown
description: Central business district, town hall, and main post office.

name: Ward 5 — Nehru Colony
description: Residential area with Nehru Park, community centre, and PHC.

name: Ward 6 — Industrial Area
description: Covers MIDC industrial estate, workers' quarters, and freight corridor.

name: Ward 7 — Ambedkar Nagar
description: Includes Ambedkar Nagar, Dalit Basti, and the new water treatment plant.

name: Ward 8 — Sadar Bazaar
description: Historic market area, railway station surroundings, and old town.

name: Ward 9 — Green Valley
description: Newly developed residential zone with parks, schools, and IT park.

name: Ward 10 — Riverside
description: Settlements along the river, flood-prone areas, and fishing communities.

name: Ward 11 — University Area
description: University campus, student hostels, and faculty housing.

name: Ward 12 — Cantonment
description: Military cantonment, defence colony, and veterans' hospital.
